visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) In a bright Costco warehouse, a woman with long dark hair, wearing a brown off-the-shoulder dress with ruffled sleeves, stands in front of a refrigerated shelf. She smiles at the camera and uses her hands to point at packages of strawberry tarts. Shoppers and storage shelves are visible in the background under flat, bright industrial lighting. (2) The camera performs a close-up zoom on a large round tart inside its clear plastic packaging. The dessert is covered in a dense layer of red strawberries and dark blue blueberries, bordered by decorative white piped cream. The woman’s hands are seen holding and presenting the package to the viewer. (3) The setting changes to an indoor home living room with warm, ambient lighting. Two women are seated at a wooden table; the woman from the store and another woman wearing a grey hat. They use metal forks to take bites of the tart from blue plates, gesturing excitedly with their hands while smiling.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 你在看什麼 小朋友. [Variety]: 不輸飯店口感. [Slogan]: 草莓藍莓乳酪塔 10月黑馬. (2) [Subtitle]: 549元最新出的乳酪塔啊. (3) [Subtitle]: 我看到很多人都說 不知道好不好吃. (4) [Subtitle]: 因為沒有人開來吃. (5) [Subtitle]: 那只好我們捨身大義. (6) [Subtitle]: 究竟好不好吃呢 就由我們來替各位 懲罰大家吧. (7) [Subtitle]: 懲罰自己的身材吧. (8) [Subtitle]: 藍莓跟草莓的量也非常的多 看起來很不錯. (9) [Subtitle]: 回去試試看. (10) [Subtitle]: 超級黑馬 好市多 10月份出了這個蛋糕 太厲害了. (11) [Subtitle]: 它不止美麗 它也非常的好吃. (12) [Subtitle]: 首先它的水果草莓 跟藍莓都又大又甜 真的很美味. (13) [Subtitle]: 接下來還是滿滿的乳酪餅皮 只是小小的點綴 你不會都是吃到厚皮. (14) [Subtitle]: 你比較像在 吃一個乳酪蛋糕 厚乳酪蛋糕. (15) [Subtitle]: 乳酪的酸鹹度 也都非常的溫和 新手絕對會接受. (16) [Subtitle]: 搭配在一起甜度又低 濃郁度非常的高. (17) [Subtitle]: 整個就是美味 草莓醬也搭的很厲害. (18) [Subtitle]: 塔皮也做的非常優秀. (19) [Subtitle]: 549元 簡直太便宜. [Variety]: ++.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator and 1 female guest seen tasting food.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with long, straight dark hair wearing a brown off-the-shoulder top with ruffles.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first background is a large warehouse retail space with industrial shelves and shoppers. The second is an indoor home setting with a wooden table and personal decor.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched female voice speaks with a very fast speech rate and an animated tone. Upbeat electronic pop BGM at 128 BPM plays with a clear synthesized beat. Ambient commercial murmurs are faint. The delivery is energetic, indicating high arousal. (2) A male voice with a deeper tone provides narrative commentary. His pitch variability is high, matching the energetic mood of the background music. The speech remains clear and enunciated. (3) A 'whoosh' transition SFX occurs. Two female voices interact simultaneously with laughing inflections. Periodic metal-on-ceramic clinking sounds are heard, along with the consistent rhythmic pop track. The acoustic environment shifts to a more contained room tone.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Location Intro -> Close-up Product Shot -> Tasting Review -> Final Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a review of a new seasonal fruit cheese tart from Costco, highlighting its ingredients, price, and taste quality to encourage or inform potential buyers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showcasing of brand logo (Costco), product name, and price, combined with positive review.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy short-form video optimized for social media engagement with heavy use of variety-show text and rapid editing.
